Introduction
!
Welcome to Module 4.
!
Congratulations. It's awesome that you've made it this far. It's pretty amazing because
it just puts you in the absolute elite. Trust me on this.
!
I go through many programs and I get to see inside many programs I know there is this
huge drop off from module one to module two, every single time no matter what
program you are in but it's amazing we are sitting here at module four and you are still
with me.
!
Basically at this point you've won the game, that's the deal, you have won the game,
congratulations. There is was a lot of to setup for it, the conceptual, that show you the
big picture strategies and tactics and I think that stuff is incredibly important and if you
didn't do anything but module one and two, well that is going to change everything for
you. But then in module three, we started to get really nitty gritty.
!
Now, in module four, this is all about the internal launch and we are going to be
doing the internal launch through module four and module five.
!
The internal launch, that's a launch that you just do to your list.
!
You are not using any partners but it's advanced beyond the seed launch where you are
just starting out and you're getting a sense to create your product and figure out what
to offer.
!
The internal launch, it's sort of this magic spot in between the seed launch and a JV
launch. It's the heart and soul of Product Launch Formula. It's the bread and butter and
it will become the bread and butter for you going forward within your launch.
!
Internal launches, they are my favorite kind of launches because they are simpler, they
are more elegant and there is still really high return, you can really make a lot of money
with internal launches, I absolutely love them.
!
Seed launches are great because you are just starting out, you get paid up front and
you create the product, that's fantastic. You learn a lot about your market.
!
The JV launches are great because they really blow it up but they also get so much
more complicated. You want to do that internal launch and get your systems in place.
!
For the internal launch you need a list and you need a product.
!

-- 2 of 3 --

It's best if you have that product thats been tested, if the offer has been tested but you
don't have to have a huge list. You can do it with this with a small list first.
!
The big picture on this is you can get a lot of money from an internal launch and it's
relatively easy and elegant and it sets up your JV launch because all of the work you
put in for your internal launch, you generally can reuse that in your JV launch. They're
awesome. I love internal launches. You can control every step of the way.
!
At the end of the day, it's about creating some pre-launch content, sending a bunch of
emails, send your list their pre-launch content and then have that lead into a sales
video or sales page.
!
You might feel like it's complicated but just go ahead and do it. Just do it, there is no
failure, there is absolutely no way you can lose, there is no failure because you are
either in this huge way and you get this big results or else you will learn a lot from your
internal launch and you'll just make it better.
!
Don't get intimated. Just remember it's about baby steps. Just taking one step at a time
and moving forward. I'm going to start off in this module the pre-launch and will show
you how to make this pre-launch content and then moving forward we are going to
create an amazing internal launch for you.
!
As always go through all the videos, watch them, take notes, circle back, watch them
again, take part in the community, the community needs you, we need you in the
community leaving comments. It builds the community, it builds our community norms,
it helps the others. It is important to others. Ask questions to answer questions. The
deal is we need you in the community. I need you in the community but you also need
us. You need us to pull you up, to pull you along. That is the community is therefore.
!
The easiest way to take part in the community is to leave a comment below the video
and let us know you are here. Just tell us you're still here, you're going to go through
this module and work on your internal launch and yeah, that's good. Let's get going.
!
You're going to love this. There is some amazing stuff in this module and the internal
launch is the course skill that is going to change everything for your business going
forward.
!
